_meta.notes: Authored to match D5 script + ag2 adapter request shape. 4 pill prompts; each emits render_a2ui tool call with component payloads that map to the declarative catalog testids. hasToolResult:false on initial tool calls to prevent re-match loops.

fixtures._comment: kpi-dashboard pill — first leg: emit render_a2ui with Card + Metric components. Expected testids: declarative-card, declarative-metric.

match.userMessage: Show me a quick KPI dashboard with 3-4 metrics

fixtures._comment: kpi-dashboard pill — second leg: narration after render_a2ui result.

match.userMessage: Show me a quick KPI dashboard with 3-4 metrics

response.content: KPI dashboard rendered above — revenue at $1.2M (+15%), signups at 8,421 (+22%), and churn down to 2.1%.

fixtures._comment: pie-chart pill — first leg: emit render_a2ui with PieChart. Expected testid: declarative-pie-chart.

match.userMessage: Show a pie chart of sales by region
Show a pie chart of sales by region

response.content: Pie chart rendered — North America leads at 42%, followed by Europe at 28%.

fixtures._comment: bar-chart pill — first leg: emit render_a2ui with BarChart. Expected testid: declarative-bar-chart.

match.userMessage: Render a bar chart of quarterly revenue
Render a bar chart of quarterly revenue

response.content: Bar chart rendered — Q4 was the strongest quarter at $420K, up from Q3's $310K.

fixtures._comment: status-report pill — first leg: emit render_a2ui with StatusBadge. Expected testid: declarative-status-badge (the distinguishing signal — earlier pills mount Card/Metric which accumulate in DOM).

match.userMessage: Give me a status report on system health
Give me a status report on system health

response.content: Status report rendered — API and Database are healthy, Background Workers showing degraded performance.
